client Directory Reference(3) Library Functions Manual client Directory Reference(3)

NAME

client Directory Reference

SYNOPSIS

Files


file audio.c
🔊 Client audio management: capture thread, sample processing, and playback coordination file audio.h
ascii-chat Client Audio Processing Management Interface file capture.c
📹 Client webcam capture: dedicated capture thread with frame rate limiting and network transmission file capture.h
ascii-chat Client Media Capture Management Interface file connection_state.h
Connection state machine for client TCP/WebSocket connections. file crypto.c
🔐 Client cryptography: handshake integration, X25519 key exchange, and per-session encryption file crypto.h
ascii-chat Client Cryptography Handler Interface file display.c
💻 Client terminal display: TTY detection, frame rendering, and interactive/stdout output routing file display.h
ascii-chat Client Display Management Interface file keepalive.c
💓 Client keepalive: periodic ping/pong exchange for reliable connection failure detection file keepalive.h
ascii-chat Client Connection Keepalive Management Interface file main.c
ascii-chat Client Main Entry Point file main.h
ascii-chat Client Mode Entry Point Header file protocol.c
📡 Client protocol handler: packet reception, parsing, and dispatch with data thread coordination file protocol.h
ascii-chat Client Protocol Handler Interface file server.c
🌐 Client connection manager: TCP connection, reconnection with exponential backoff, and thread-safe transmission file server.h
ascii-chat Client Server Connection Management Interface file webrtc.c
Client-side WebRTC signaling callback implementations. file webrtc.h
Client-side WebRTC signaling callback implementations.
